textPlain: It certainly doesn’t feel good to have turned out being correct after warning that this is where we were headed way back in the dubyah years. This has always been the plan, it hasn’t been hidden, corporate media has just succeeded in sanewashing it for decades. Abdication of journalistic responsibility in the name of profits has allowed construction of alternate realities for so many people that these atrocities are now possible with few noticing.
I guess this is what happened in germany. Wops, looks like we are entering Poland. Good news, job opportunities building gas chambers. Many more housing offer...did the prices go up or down?
